

# Discussion

```{r setup-0600-discussion}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.path = "fig/0600-discussion/", dev = "png")
```

<!-- Interpretation of community patterns in context of watershed condition.
     Comparison to reference conditions and other Upper Bulkley studies.
     Implications for restoration planning (link to restoration_wedzin_kwa_2024).
     Recommendations for future monitoring. -->
